'''Canron''' was a jellied meat which was carefully braised and seasoned. It was a popular [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]], and due to its high price, it was often [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] around the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

{{Food-stub}}
